vocab.meaning: một mớ âm thanh hỗn độn, tai quái
vocab.example: Living in the city center means I wake up to a cacophony of sounds, from blaring horns to screeching brakes.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn xung quanh/tiếng ồn nền
vocab.example: I've grown so accustomed to the ambient noise of the office that I find total silence quite unsettling.

vocab.meaning: tiếng nói chuyện phiếm không ngớt
vocab.example: The incessant chatter of commuters on the train can be quite draining during my morning journey.

vocab.meaning: tiếng bịch/tiếng động trầm đục bị bóp nghẹt
vocab.example: In my apartment, I occasionally hear the muffled thud of footsteps from the neighbors living upstairs.

vocab.meaning: xé tan bầu không khí tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: Every few hours, the high-pitched siren of an ambulance will pierce the silence of our suburban street.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ù ù tần số thấp
vocab.example: There is a constant low-frequency hum from the industrial air conditioning units nearby that never seems to stop.

vocab.meaning: sự quá tải về thính giác (do quá nhiều tiếng ồn)
vocab.example: Visiting the local wet market often results in auditory overload because of the shouting vendors and clattering pans.

vocab.meaning: tiếng lạch cạch và loảng xoảng
vocab.example: I can always hear the rattle and clatter of the old elevator whenever someone on my floor uses it.
The sound of construction work tends to echo through the narrow alleyways of my neighborhood all day long.
The roar of the jet engines from the nearby airport completely drowns out our conversation every time a plane takes off.
